scope: Extend the first security discovery tranche from 3 to 6 collected candidates and refresh the bounded hybrid read

decision_context.prior_state: The first security tranche had 3 accepted candidates and a bounded hybrid read that kept the whole slice in frontier.
decision_context.decision: Fill three more security-cluster agents with evidence-grounded candidates, refresh the partial pilot result, and rerun the bounded hybrid validation from the updated 6-candidate result.
decision_context.why_now: The security wedge already showed enough signal to justify one more small collection step before moving to another cluster.

files_expected.purpose: Stores the next three security-cluster candidates.
Updates the live pilot progress to 6 filled agents.
Stores the refreshed 6-candidate partial pilot result.
Stores the corrected 6-domain bounded hybrid run.

planned_steps: Fill three more security-cluster agent slots with evidence-grounded candidates
Refresh the partial pilot result and progress surface
Rerun the bounded hybrid validation from the updated result

commands: $env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m chip_labs.cli mirofish-discovery-program-progress --input-dir research/meta/mirofish_discovery_pilot_100_clusters_2026-03-24 --output research/meta/MIROFISH_DISCOVERY_PROGRAM_PILOT_100_PROGRESS_2026-03-24.json --markdown-output research/meta/MIROFISH_DISCOVERY_PROGRAM_PILOT_100_PROGRESS_2026-03-24.md --title "MiroFish Discovery Pilot 100 Progress"
$env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m pytest tests/test_mirofish_discovery.py tests/test_watchtower.py tests/test_mirofish_portfolio.py tests/test_trend_prediction.py -q
expected_checks: The pilot progress snapshot shows 6 filled agents and 6 raw candidates
The refreshed partial pilot result accepts all 6 candidates as clear_domain_chip
The corrected hybrid run includes all 6 discovered domains rather than the stale 3-domain spec
The focused regression suite stays green

guardrails: Do not treat the temporary stale 3-domain spec as the final evaluation artifact
Record the corrected 6-domain hybrid artifacts as the valid read for this tranche
Keep this as a security-cluster extension rather than pretending the whole 100-agent pilot is complete
